text:
Boston College alum Erika Reineke (ГўВҖВҳ17) will compete in the 2024 Paris Olympic Games as a part of the USAГўВҖВҷs sailing team.ГӮ

During her time in Chestnut Hill, the 30-year-old majored in Environmental Studies and won four individual national championships as well as NEISA Conference Sailor of the Year awards.ГӮ

Reineke will compete in the womenГўВҖВҷs dinghy race on August 1 in Marseille, France.ГӮ

"I came in as a free-spirited freshman with no plan or structure and graduated gaining the ability to goal set and execute,ГўВҖВқ said Reinekewhile speaking to Alix Hacketton her time as an Eagle. ГўВҖВңI wouldnГўВҖВҷt be in the position I am today without my BC teammates or Coach [Greg] Wilkinson.ГўВҖВқ

41 days.ГӮ
